general.Display name - Tooltip: A human-friendly label shown in the UI instead of the internal identifier
general.Favicon URL - Tooltip: URL of the .ico or image file used as the browser tab icon
general.Footer HTML - Tooltip: Custom HTML injected into the page footer; supports inline styles and scripts
general.HTML title - Tooltip: Text shown in the browser tab and window title bar for this site
general.Logo URL - Tooltip: URL of the image displayed as the site logo in the header
general.Name: Name
general.Name - Tooltip: Unique identifier for this site; used in URLs and API calls
general.Navbar HTML - Tooltip: Custom HTML injected into the navigation bar; supports inline styles and scripts
general.Static base URL - Tooltip: Base URL of your CDN or static file server; used to prefix all static asset paths

policy.Reload Enforcer tooltip: Reload enforcer from DB (auto-reloads on every mutation)
policy.Subject: Subject (user or role)
policy.admission desc: ValidatingAdmissionWebhook — intercepts write operations (CREATE / UPDATE / DELETE / CONNECT) before resources are persisted to etcd. p = policy (subject, namespace, resource, action, effect) · g = role assignment · * = wildcard. A default allow * rule is seeded on first run. system:* users are never affected.
policy.authorization desc: Authorization Webhook — intercepts every API request (get / list / watch / create …) after Node and RBAC authorizers, before the request reaches the handler. p = policy (subject, namespace, resource, verb, effect) · g = role assignment · * = wildcard. A default allow * rule is seeded on first run. system:* users bypass this webhook entirely.

provider.Client ID - Tooltip: The client ID issued by your OAuth provider when you registered this application
provider.Client secret - Tooltip: The client secret issued by your OAuth provider; keep this value confidential

site.Advanced desc: Proxy, logging, and other advanced options
site.Log config - Tooltip: Logging configuration in JSON format; controls log level, output format, and targets
site.OIDC issuer - Tooltip: Base URL of the OIDC provider (e.g. https://accounts.example.com); used for discovery
site.Socks5 proxy - Tooltip: Socks5 proxy address for outbound requests (e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:1080)
site.Theme color - Tooltip: Primary accent color applied across the UI; accepts any valid CSS color value

trivy.Title: Title
trivy.page desc: Scans container images for known CVE vulnerabilities using Trivy. Images with CRITICAL findings are blocked by the Admission Webhook.
trivy.scan may take minutes: Scanning may take 1–3 minutes depending on the image size and vulnerability database.
